ddls:
CREATE TABLE "peptides" (
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peptide */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the peptide */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the peptide sequence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the peptide */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the peptide was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the peptide */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the peptide */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the peptide */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the peptide (e.g., synthetic, natural) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the peptide is derived (if natural) */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Known biological activity of the peptide (e.g., antimicrobial, antifungal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data (e.g., public dataset, internal dataset) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model (e.g., CNN, SVM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide being predicted */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model making the prediction */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value for the peptide */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prediction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the prediction */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction (e.g., 0.95) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES prediction_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide being tested */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value of the peptide */,
  "vote_fraction" REAL /* Vote fraction for the peptide */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the result */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment in which the result was obtained */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Method used to obtain the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_results_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the peptide or model */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide being accessed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES prediction_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES prediction_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptide_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the peptide */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptide_versions_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions_history" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide being predicted */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model making the prediction */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value for the peptide */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prediction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the prediction */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction (e.g., 0.95) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES prediction_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_history_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_results_history" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide being tested */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value of the peptide */,
  "vote_fraction" REAL /* Vote fraction for the peptide */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date of result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the result */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment in which the result was obtained */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Method used to obtain the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_results_history_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)
